headline: Allegion plc (ALLE) Expands Access Control Solutions Segment with DCI Acquisition
summary: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) is one of the best stocks to invest in for good returns. On March 4, Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) announced it had reached an agreement to acquire privately held DCI Hollow Metal on-demand through one of its subsidiaries. With the acquisition, the company gains access to a leading US manufacturer of custom quick-ship […]

headline: Allegion's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Allegion is anticipated to release its first-quarter results soon, and analysts predict a single-digit rise in the company’s bottom-line figure.

headline: Allegion PLC (NYSE:ALLE) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Quality Investing Screen
summary: Allegion PLC exemplifies quality investing with strong growth, exceptional capital returns, and robust cash flow, making it a durable long-term prospect.
